name: Mincemeat Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups prepared mincemeat or green tomato mincemeat
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the cookie mix with milk until smooth.
2. Spread half of the mixture in a greased 9-inch x 9-inch square pan.
3. Spread the mincemeat over the cookie mixture.
4. Cover with the remaining cookie mixture, packing lightly.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
6. Allow to cool completely.
7. Cut into bars. Makes about 2 dozen.
